title: Los GiriGiri Fantasy
description: A cozy fantasy Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 focused on exploration, magic, technology, and coop-friendly gameplay.
body:
Los GiriGiri Fantasy is a cozy fantasy–RPG Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, built for players who enjoy exploration, magic, technology, and relaxed cooperative gameplay.

The modpack combines beautiful world generation, fantasy-themed combat and spells, Create-based technology, and a deep food and farming system, creating a balanced experience that works for both long survival worlds and casual multiplayer sessions.

Exploration plays a major role in Los GiriGiri Fantasy, with enhanced terrain, new structures, towers, bridges, and dungeons that reward curiosity and adventure. Players will encounter new mobs, fantasy creatures, and wildlife that make the world feel alive and immersive.

Magic and RPG progression are central to the experience. Choose spells, abilities, and equipment that fit your playstyle, while enjoying improved combat through new weapons, shields, and RPG mechanics. The pack also includes revive systems and graves, making cooperative play more forgiving and enjoyable.

Technology is handled through Create and its add-ons, allowing players to build creative machines, farms, and automation systems without overwhelming complexity.

For quality of life, the modpack includes backpacks, minimaps, waystones, inventory management tools, and performance optimizations. Iris shader support is included, with compatibility for both high-end and low-end PCs.

Los GiriGiri Fantasy is designed to be stable, smooth, and friendly for multiplayer—perfect for friends or couples who want a magical, cozy, and adventurous Minecraft experience.
